qa_pairs.question: What is the first step in the "Adding Data directives" challenge?
qa_pairs.answer: The first step in the "Adding Data directives" challenge is to modify the code to use explicit data directives, utilizing either the <tt>kernels</tt> or the <tt>parallel loop</tt> directives.

qa_pairs.question: How should the compiler flags be adjusted when working on the "Adding Data directives" challenge?
qa_pairs.answer: For the "Adding Data directives" challenge, you should change your compiler flags to <tt>-ta=tesla</tt>, ensuring it is not the managed version.

qa_pairs.question: After modifying the code and compiler flags in the "Adding Data directives" challenge, what should be verified?
qa_pairs.answer: After modifying the code to use explicit data directives and changing the compiler flags, you should check if you are getting the same results and performance as before.
